title: General Aeronautics
summary: Turned a complex drone portfolio into a clearer digital story buyers, partners, and operators could trust faster.
modalIntro: General Aeronautics builds drone systems across agriculture, defense, humanitarian response, and warehouse automation. As the portfolio expanded, the challenge was making that breadth easier to understand, trust, and navigate.
modalOutcomes: Reframed a broad drone portfolio into a sharper market story.
Made technical capabilities easier for non-technical audiences to understand.
Improved credibility across web, applications, and communication assets.
Built a stronger platform for future product and growth decisions.

modalSections.body: General Aeronautics had real depth across multiple drone categories, but that breadth was difficult to communicate clearly in one digital experience.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: Without a clearer narrative, technical breadth risked reading as fragmentation. Buyers, partners, and operators all needed a simpler path through what the company offered and why it mattered.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: Yuvabe paired a website revamp with brand refresh, UI/UX direction, and supporting content so product communication and credibility cues reinforced each other.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: The result was a clearer business story, more intuitive interfaces, and a stronger foundation for future launches and brand growth.
modalSections.title: Outcome

seoDescription: See how Yuvabe helped General Aeronautics turn a broad drone portfolio into a clearer digital story across website, product UX, and brand systems.

items.title: Positioning-led homepage
items.description: A clearer first impression that communicates the scope of the drone portfolio without overwhelming buyers.

items.title: Product communication system
items.description: A clearer way to present agricultural, defense, and automation capabilities across web and supporting assets.

items.title: Application UX direction
items.description: Interface decisions that made complex mission-planning workflows easier to understand and navigate.

items.title: Content and campaign assets
items.description: Illustrations, video, blogs, and social creatives that kept the story consistent beyond the website.

modalProofPoints.title: Sharpened market story
modalProofPoints.description: Turned a complex product portfolio into a clearer business narrative that buyers and partners could understand and trust faster.

modalProofPoints.title: Unified touchpoints
modalProofPoints.description: Aligned website, product UX, and supporting communication assets into one more coherent system.

modalProofPoints.title: Built for scale
modalProofPoints.description: Created a stronger platform for future launches, campaigns, and product communication decisions.

modalTestimonial.quote: The work made a technically complex drone business easier to understand and easier to trust. Website, product UX, and supporting assets finally reinforced the same story instead of fragmenting it.

title: Bevolve.ai
summary: Turned fragmented sustainability reporting into an AI-guided system teams could trust for faster, evidence-based decisions.
modalIntro: Bevolve.ai needed a product experience that could bring together fragmented ESG and sustainability data, automate reporting workflows, and make decision support easier for teams navigating compliance pressure.
modalOutcomes: Unified structured and unstructured ESG data into one clearer workflow.
Accelerated reporting, validation, and compliance monitoring through automation.
Improved transparency with natural-language querying and AI-assisted analysis.
Enabled stronger benchmarking across sectors, regions, and peer groups.

modalSections.body: Bevolve.ai sits at the intersection of ESG reporting, sustainability intelligence, and compliance automation. The product needed to handle complex data while still giving teams a usable, credible decision-making experience.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: The core problem was not just data volume but trust. Teams needed reporting workflows that could connect multiple data sources, maintain accuracy, and stay understandable as standards evolved.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: Yuvabe helped shape an AI sustainability platform with Open AI-powered assistance, benchmarking workflows, AI-guided insights, and automation across reporting, validation, and compliance monitoring.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: The resulting system gave teams a faster, more transparent path through ESG reporting and benchmarking while improving confidence in evidence-based decisions.
modalSections.title: Outcome

seoDescription: Learn how Yuvabe helped Bevolve.ai turn fragmented ESG reporting into an AI-guided product system for faster, evidence-based decisions.

title: tvam
summary: Built advisor-style AI tools that turned complex health, policy, and exam-prep workflows into one product experience users could actually navigate with confidence.
modalIntro: tvam focused on simplifying health guidance, policy support, and exam-prep workflows through advisor-style AI tools. The challenge was turning multiple AI capabilities into one product experience that felt useful, reliable, and easy to navigate — without losing the depth that made each tool valuable.
modalOutcomes: Built AI-powered Health and Policy Advisors plus a USMLE preparation tool.
Integrated chat-based AI, secure conversation storage, TTS/STT support, vector search, and file uploads.
Used Retrieval-Augmented Generation patterns and cloud deployment workflows for scale.
Made complex health and policy workflows easier to use through clearer product orchestration.

modalSections.body: tvam needed a more coherent narrative across product, experience, and communication as the scope of the work expanded.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: We aligned the experience, supporting systems, and communication touchpoints around what users and stakeholders needed to understand at each step.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: A sharper product story, a more usable experience, and a stronger platform built to support future growth decisions.

title: KittyKat
summary: Built a generative AI fashion platform that turned product photos into realistic model visuals at scale with faster turnaround and less production overhead.
modalIntro: KittyKat needed a way to generate realistic fashion imagery at scale — without the delay and cost of repeated production shoots. The work focused on turning product-to-model image generation into a more reliable AI workflow with the output quality a premium fashion brand actually needs.
modalOutcomes: Built a generative AI fashion platform that automated product-to-model image generation.
Improved realism at scale through data preprocessing, model optimization, and advanced image-generation workflows.
Improved facial alignment, body proportions, and final image quality for premium brand presentation.
Enabled the client to generate thousands of visuals faster for stronger storytelling and customer engagement.

modalSections.body: KittyKat was positioned around AI-generated fashion visuals, but the real product challenge was not novelty alone. The platform had to turn ordinary product photos into realistic model imagery that a fashion brand could actually use across campaigns and commerce touchpoints.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: Generating fashion imagery with AI becomes difficult when realism breaks down. Facial alignment, body proportions, and consistency all needed to hold up well enough for premium presentation, while the workflow still had to move faster than traditional production.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: Yuvabe built the product-to-model generation workflow, then improved output quality through data preprocessing, model optimization, and hierarchical image refinement — tuning the pipeline to feel reliable, scalable, and aligned to real fashion use cases rather than generic AI output.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: The result was a generative AI fashion platform that reduced production delay, improved final image quality, and made it easier for the client to create large volumes of branded visuals for stronger storytelling and customer engagement.
modalSections.title: Outcome

seoDescription: See how Yuvabe built a generative AI fashion workflow for KittyKat that improved realism, reduced production delays, and scaled branded visual output.

items.title: Product-to-model pipeline
items.description: A landscape-oriented workflow for turning static product inputs into styled model imagery without the overhead of repeated shoots.

items.title: Prompt and variation control
items.description: A supporting generation layer that helps teams explore more brand-relevant outputs while keeping the workflow commercially usable.

items.title: Image quality tuning
items.description: Refinement passes focused on realism, body proportion, and facial consistency so AI visuals hold up for premium presentation.

items.title: Campaign-ready asset system
items.description: A scalable output layer that makes it easier to generate larger batches of visuals for storytelling, catalog, and brand content.

modalProofPoints.title: Automated product-to-model generation
modalProofPoints.description: Turned product photos into model visuals through a faster AI-led production workflow.

modalProofPoints.title: Improved realism and quality
modalProofPoints.description: Used data preprocessing and hierarchical refinement to improve proportion accuracy and premium visual output.

modalProofPoints.title: Scaled on brand visual production
modalProofPoints.description: Reduced image creation time and made it easier to produce larger volumes of usable campaign assets.

modalTestimonial.quote: The value of the work was not just faster image generation. It was building an AI visual pipeline that improved realism, reduced production delay, and made large-scale branded output far more usable.

title: AgeShift
summary: Delivered an AI-enabled wellness platform spanning mobile app, backend APIs, admin tools, and cloud infrastructure.
modalIntro: AgeShift needed a connected wellness product ecosystem that could guide users through routines, protocol tracking, and AI-powered recommendations — while giving administrators the operational visibility to manage it all with confidence.
modalOutcomes: Built a Flutter mobile app, FastAPI backend, and Next.js admin panel on Google Cloud Platform.
Added AI-driven recommendations, structured protocol tracking, and unified user/admin workflows.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines for more reliable builds, testing, and deployment.
Created a secure, scalable product base for ongoing growth and behavior-driven insights.

modalSections.body: AgeShift needed one coherent product ecosystem — connecting member experience, admin operations, and AI-driven guidance into a single platform that could scale as the business grew.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: The opportunity was not just to ship assets, but to help the business communicate value faster and with more confidence.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: We aligned the experience, supporting systems, and communication touchpoints around what users and stakeholders needed to understand next.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: A more connected product, a more capable admin platform, and a scalable infrastructure ready for future growth and behavior-driven product decisions.
modalSections.title: Outcome

seoDescription: Read how Yuvabe delivered AgeShift's AI-enabled wellness platform across mobile, backend APIs, admin tooling, and secure cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Wellness app journey
items.description: A mobile-first product flow for routines, check-ins, and protocol guidance — built to feel calmer, clearer, and more actionable so users stay engaged with their wellness journey over time.

items.description: Structured user flows that make ongoing habit tracking and next-step guidance easier to understand over time.

modalProofPoints.title: Built for secure scaling

modalTestimonial.quote: The impact came from connecting the whole system. Mobile experience, backend APIs, admin tooling, AI recommendations, and cloud infrastructure were built to work together instead of behaving like separate layers.
